canvas.$description: Primary application canvas behind all surfaces and page content. Use when a header or footer should blend into the page background instead of reading as a separate container.

subtle.$description: Quiet nested background for low-emphasis sections inside the canvas or a surface. Useful for grouped zones inside a header or footer, not usually for the full shell itself.

surface.$description: Default surface background for headers, cards, panels, and standard containers. Recommended default for site headers that should feel anchored but not elevated.

surface-raised.$description: Raised surface background for elevated cards and emphasized content blocks. Suitable for footers or structural sections that need stronger separation from the canvas.

surface-overlay.$description: Overlay surface background for floating panels that sit above raised surfaces. Reserve for popovers, menus, or temporary layers rather than persistent headers or footers.

field-hover.$description: Field background on hover. Pair with hover border treatment rather than changing text color.

field-disabled.$description: Field background for disabled form controls and unavailable inputs.

inverse.$description: Inverted background for high-contrast surfaces against the current theme.

brand.$description: Primary brand fill for key actions and selected high-emphasis controls.

brand-hover.$description: Brand fill on hover for primary actions and highlighted controls.

brand-active.$description: Pressed brand fill for primary actions and active highlighted controls.

brand-subtle.$description: Low-intensity brand-tinted background for quiet brand emphasis. Use sparingly in header or footer accents, not as the default shell color.

neutral-hover.$description: Neutral fill on hover for quiet controls and secondary actions.

neutral-active.$description: Pressed neutral fill for quiet controls and secondary actions.

success-subtle.$description: Low-intensity success background for positive feedback and confirmation surfaces.

warning-subtle.$description: Low-intensity warning background for caution messages and pending states.

danger-subtle.$description: Low-intensity danger background for destructive warnings and critical notices.

accent-subtle.$description: Low-intensity accent background for quiet accent emphasis.

primary.$description: Default high-emphasis text color for headings, navigation labels, and key readable content on standard surfaces, including headers and footers.

secondary.$description: Secondary text color for supporting copy, metadata, and lower-emphasis content on standard surfaces, including footer descriptions and sublabels.

muted.$description: Lower-emphasis text color for helper copy and supporting metadata.

inverse.$description: Text color for content shown on inverted backgrounds. Use when a header or footer intentionally flips to an inverse surface treatment.

on-brand.$description: Semantic text color for text placed on brand fills. Use when the meaning is explicitly brand-led.

on-danger.$description: Semantic text color for text placed on danger fills. Use for destructive or critical actions.

brand.$description: Semantic text color for brand emphasis on quiet surfaces.

success.$description: Semantic text color for positive emphasis on quiet surfaces.

warning.$description: Semantic text color for caution emphasis on quiet surfaces.

danger.$description: Semantic text color for critical emphasis on quiet surfaces.

on-fill.$description: High-contrast text color for text placed on any strong filled surface, such as brand buttons, pills, or filled accents inside a header or footer.

accent.$description: Semantic text color for accent emphasis on quiet surfaces.

link.$description: Default link color with accessible contrast on canvas and surface backgrounds. Recommended for footer link groups and linked metadata on standard surfaces.

link-hover.$description: Hover link color that keeps links clearly interactive without dropping the underline.

link-visited.$description: Visited link color that remains distinct from default and hover states.

secondary.$description: Secondary icon color for supporting affordances and lower-emphasis actions.

muted.$description: Low-emphasis icon color for supporting metadata and secondary affordances.

disabled.$description: Icon color for disabled or unavailable controls.

inverse.$description: Icon color for content shown on inverted backgrounds.

on-brand.$description: Semantic icon color for icons placed on brand fills. Use when the meaning is explicitly brand-led.

on-danger.$description: Semantic icon color for icons placed on danger fills. Use for destructive or critical actions.

brand.$description: Semantic icon color for brand emphasis on quiet surfaces.

on-fill.$description: High-contrast icon color for icons placed on any strong filled surface.

accent.$description: Semantic icon color for accent emphasis on quiet surfaces.

default.$description: Default border color for fields, cards, standard component outlines, and structural separators such as header or footer dividers on standard surfaces.

focus.$description: High-visibility focus border used with the focus ring to show keyboard focus.

brand.$description: Brand border for highlighted brand-led components and selections.

danger.$description: Danger border for destructive states and critical feedback.

success.$description: Success border for positive feedback and confirmation states.

accent.$description: Accent border for editorial emphasis and accent-driven components.

warning.$description: Warning border for caution states and pending feedback.

ring.$description: Focus ring color for accessible keyboard focus indicators.

overlay-hover.$description: Translucent overlay layered over a filled surface to show hover without changing the base fill.

overlay-pressed.$description: Translucent overlay layered over a filled surface to show pressed state without changing the base fill.
